free_text: Fragment emission studies of the 16O + 12C reaction.
The target used was 514 mu-g/cm2 self-supporting 12C.
using two Si(SB) telescopes (about 10 mu-m dE,about
300 mu-m E, and  about 10 mu-m dE,about 5 mm E).
The calibration of telescopes were done using
elastically scattered 16O ion from Au target.
The systematic errors in the data have been
estimated to be 15%. These include the errors arising
Part of these uncertainties are due to Gaussian fitting
procedure employed to extract the energy damped yields.
data were received from Dr. C.Bhattacharya
Entry was approved by Dr. C.Bhattacharya
